2146980.name: Age of Hell Demo
2146980.description:
You are The Crusader, the last member of an ancient order of holy warriors pledged to defend the mortal plane against horrors from the abyss. The realm has been quiet for centuries. Your fellow defenders have all been slain or lost to the mists … but something is stirring. Something evil. Rumours of horrors stalking the wilderness have reached your ears in your mountain fastness. Now, a frontier outpost has fallen silent, it is time to venture forth to test the veracity of the whispered fears …

Features


  • Blistering combat against the literal armies of Hell. Test your mettle against 100s of demons at once and send them screaming back to the void.
  • A full arsenal of holy themed weapons to blast, burn, vaporise and smash your foes.
  • 6 uniquely themed episodes each with their own distinct aesthetic. Battle through brutalist icescapes, gothic cathedrals, forgotten crypts, twisted tech and the horrors of the abyss.
  • An all new OST written by a collection of composers at the top of their game.
  • A veritable menagerie of demonic entities to pit your strength against including over a dozen bosses.
  • Dedicate game mode where the only weapon you have is Dawnbreaker, your indomitable hammer. A randomised upgrade system adds a host of new challenges and play styles to your experience.
2146980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
